results.content:
01 WS-CONSTANTS.
   05  LIT-THISPGM             PIC X(8)        VALUE 'COTRTLIC'.
   05  LIT-THISTRANID          PIC X(4)        VALUE 'CTLI'.
   05  LIT-THISMAPSET          PIC X(7)        VALUE 'COTRTLI'.
   05  LIT-THISMAP             PIC X(7)        VALUE 'CTRTLIA'.
   05  LIT-ADMINPGM             PIC X(8)       VALUE 'COADM01C'.
   05  LIT-ADMINTRANID          PIC X(4)       VALUE 'CA00'.
   05  LIT-ADMINMAPSET          PIC X(7)       VALUE 'COADM01'.
   05  LIT-ADDTPGM             PIC X(8)        VALUE 'COTRTUPC'.
   05  LIT-ADDTTRANID          PIC X(4)        VALUE 'CTTU'.
   05  LIT-ADDTMAPSET          PIC X(7)        VALUE 'COTRTUP'.
   05  LIT-ADDTMAP             PIC X(7)        VALUE 'CTRTUPA'.
   05  LIT-DSNTIAC             PIC X(7)        VALUE 'DSNTIAC'.
   05  LIT-ASTERISK            PIC X(7)        VALUE '*'.
   05  LIT-TRANTYPE-TABLE      PIC X(30)       VALUE
                                             'TRANSACTION_TYPE '.
   05  LIT-DELETE-FLAG         PIC X(1)        VALUE 'D'.
   05  LIT-UPDATE-FLAG         PIC X(1)        VALUE 'U'.
   05  WS-MAX-SCREEN-LINES     PIC S9(4)      COMP VALUE 7.

******************************************************************
* Literals for use in INSPECT statements
******************************************************************
    05 LIT-ALL-ALPHANUM-FROM-X.
       10 LIT-ALL-ALPHA-FROM-X.
          15 LIT-UPPER                       PIC X(26)
                           VALUE 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'.
          15 LIT-LOWER                       PIC X(26)
                           VALUE 'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'.
       10 LIT-NUMBERS                        PIC X(10)
                           VALUE '0123456789'.

* Variables for use in INSPECT statements
******************************************************************

results.content:
01 WS-THIS-PROGCOMMAREA.
      10 WS-CA-TYPE-CD                          PIC X(02)
                                                VALUE SPACES.
      10 WS-CA-TYPE-CD-N REDEFINES WS-CA-TYPE-CD PIC 9(02).
      10 WS-CA-TYPE-DESC                        PIC X(50).

******************************************************************
*  Screen Data Array         52 CHARS X 7 ROWS = 364
******************************************************************
       10 FILLER.
          15 WS-CA-ALL-ROWS-OUT                 PIC X(364).
          15 FILLER REDEFINES WS-CA-ALL-ROWS-OUT.
             20 WS-CA-SCREEN-ROWS-OUT   OCCURS  7 TIMES.
                30 WS-CA-EACH-ROW-OUT.
                   35 WS-CA-ROW-TR-CODE-OUT     PIC X(02).
                   35 WS-CA-ROW-TR-DESC-OUT     PIC X(50).


      10 WS-CA-ROW-SELECTED                     PIC S9(4) COMP
                                                VALUE 0.
      10 WS-CA-PAGING-VARIABLES.
         15 WS-CA-LAST-TTYPEKEY.
            20  WS-CA-LAST-TR-CODE              PIC X(02).
         15 WS-CA-FIRST-TTYPEKEY.
            20  WS-CA-FIRST-TR-CODE             PIC X(02).

         15 WS-CA-SCREEN-NUM                    PIC 9(1).
            88 CA-FIRST-PAGE                    VALUE 1.
         15 WS-CA-LAST-PAGE-DISPLAYED           PIC 9(1).
            88 CA-LAST-PAGE-SHOWN               VALUE 0.
            88 CA-LAST-PAGE-NOT-SHOWN           VALUE 9.
         15 WS-CA-NEXT-PAGE-IND                 PIC X(1).
            88 CA-NEXT-PAGE-NOT-EXISTS          VALUE LOW-VALUES.
            88 CA-NEXT-PAGE-EXISTS              VALUE 'Y'.
       10 WS-CA-DELETE-FLAG                     PIC X.
            88 CA-DELETE-NOT-REQUESTED          VALUE LOW-VALUES.
            88 CA-DELETE-REQUESTED              VALUE 'Y'.
            88 CA-DELETE-SUCCEEDED              VALUE LOW-VALUES.
       10 WS-CA-UPDATE-FLAG                     PIC X.
            88 CA-UPDATE-NOT-REQUESTED          VALUE LOW-VALUES.
            88 CA-UPDATE-REQUESTED              VALUE 'Y'.
            88 CA-UPDATE-SUCCEEDED              VALUE LOW-VALUES.
